summary: Team-Aware Invite Suggestions Feature Testing Complete - All 5 endpoints verified. Backend: 24/24 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All UI components working (PendingAssignmentBanner, athlete checkboxes, assign/dismiss buttons). Full E2E flow verified: create invite with team → accept → banner appears → assign athletes → banner removed.
critical_code_review_comments: PendingAssignmentBanner component correctly renders with all required elements (data-testid attributes present)
Dismiss flow correctly sets assignment_reviewed=True and removes banner from UI
Assign flow correctly bulk-assigns athletes and refreshes ownership cache
Edge case handled: Invites without team do NOT appear in pending-assignments
Edge case handled: Invites with 0 unassigned athletes show appropriate fallback message
Email delivery shows 'Send failed' in test environment but invite is created with copy-link fallback
seed_data_creation: E2E test unassigned one athlete (Jake Williams) to test the full flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Team-Aware Invite Suggestions feature fully verified. Key endpoints: POST /api/invites (with optional team field), POST /api/invites/accept/{token} (sets assignment_reviewed=False), GET /api/invites/pending-assignments (returns accepted invites with team context + unassigned athletes), POST /api/invites/{id}/assign-athletes (bulk assign + sets assignment_reviewed=True), POST /api/invites/{id}/dismiss-assignment (sets assignment_reviewed=True). Teams are: 'U18 Academy', 'U17 Premier', 'U16 Elite'. PendingAssignmentBanner component renders between invite form and invite list on /invites page.

backend_endpoints: POST /api/invites - Creates invite with optional team field ✓
POST /api/invites/accept/{token} - Creates coach account, sets accepted_user_id and assignment_reviewed=False ✓
GET /api/invites/pending-assignments - Returns accepted invites with unassigned team athletes (director only) ✓
POST /api/invites/{id}/assign-athletes - Bulk assigns athletes, sets assignment_reviewed=True ✓
POST /api/invites/{id}/dismiss-assignment - Dismisses without assigning, sets assignment_reviewed=True ✓
frontend_components: PendingAssignmentBanner component renders correctly with coach name and team ✓
Assign button shows count (e.g., 'Assign 1 athlete') with data-testid='assign-selected-btn' ✓
Skip for now button with data-testid='dismiss-assignment-btn' ✓
Banner disappears after assign or dismiss ✓
Empty state shows 'No unassigned athletes found' message ✓
edge_cases_verified: Invite without team does NOT appear in pending-assignments ✓
Already-reviewed invites (assignment_reviewed=True) do NOT appear again ✓

e2e_flow_verified.step1: Director creates invite with team 'U16 Elite' ✓
